markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate and improve Atlas workflow for content creation, focusing on assignment brief and keyword research processes.](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current Atlas workflow needs refinement, particularly in assignment brief and keyword research stages](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Team identified need for more control over keyword selection and content structure](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Proposed improvements include separating keyword research from content structure planning](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Importance of understanding ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) and user journey in content creation emphasized](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Workflow Evaluation

  - [Team ran test workflows for Webflow and Strappy clients](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Identified issues with keyword selection, content structure, and workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Noted that assignment brief generation is slower in Atlas compared to AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Output quality appears similar to previous system](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Keyword Research Process Improvement

  - [Current keyword selection process relies too heavily on variations of the target keyword](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [Proposed improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
      - [Incorporate broad match keywords from SEMrush (20-30 keywords)](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=3467.0)
      - [Include semantically related topics from top-ranking articles](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=3426.0)
      - [Consider keyword difficulty and search volume in selection](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=3467.0)
      - [Integrate "People Also Ask" questions for content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=3426.0)

### Content Structure Planning

  - [Suggestion to separate keyword research from content structure planning in the workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=3912.0)
  - [Importance of aligning content structure with ICP knowledge gaps and search intent](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4004.0)
  - [Proposed process:](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4122.0)
    1.  Identify important topics from existing ranking articles
    2.  Conduct lighter keyword research for each topic
    3.  Create a cohesive assignment brief with primary and secondary keywords

### User Intent and ICP Consideration

  - [Emphasized importance of understanding ICP's current knowledge and information gaps](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4266.0)
  - [Suggested tailoring content depth based on funnel position (top, middle, bottom)](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4279.0)
  - [Proposed adding an ICP knowledge gap section to inform content structure](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4266.0)

### Workflow Usability Issues

  - [Difficulty in editing multiple assignment briefs efficiently in the new interface](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=2705.0)
  - [Need for better control over workflow steps and artifact referencing](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=2698.0)
  - [Suggestion to improve assignment direction capabilities for specifying content types (e.g., how-to, listicle)](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4683.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jürgen to document discussed improvements and link to video timestamps](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4554.0)
  - [Team to review Carol's response regarding assignment direction capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4683.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to file improvement tickets based on documented suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4561.0)
  - [Continue testing and using Atlas while working on refinements](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4637.0)
  - [Sydney and Jürgen to meet separately to discuss client handoffs and article strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Nz_Awms-AoTsY_nFwVsj5pmxziqhQ-xV?tab=summary&timestamp=4710.0)
